entities.name: CROP BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: A program aimed at creating variability and selecting desirable genotypes for cultivation or breeding purposes

entities.name: VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity of genetic characteristics created within a crop breeding program

entities.name: GENOTYPE
entities.description: The genetic constitution of an organism selected for cultivation or breeding

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A highly self-pollinated crop subject to genetic and breeding studies

entities.name: EMASCULATION
entities.description: A process requiring special skills in the breeding of groundnut

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: A process requiring special skills in the breeding of groundnut

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: A process requiring special skills in the breeding of groundnut

entities.name: GENETIC STUDIES
entities.description: Research that assists in understanding inheritance mechanisms and enhancing breeding efficiency

entities.name: INHERITANCE MECHANISM
entities.description: The process of trait transmission studied through genetic research

entities.name: GENETICS
entities.description: The study of heredity and variation in organisms, specifically applied to groundnut

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The practice of improving plant traits, specifically applied to groundnut
